calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-21-2013 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-04-2012 Set For Trial On Jul-15-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-16-2012 Continued To Oct-17-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-27-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Simon Mazzola, Esq., of The Mazzola Law Office, Tel. 650.403.4802, appearing for defendant and moving party.
Arlo Garcia Uriarte, Esq., of Liberation Law Group, Tel. 415.695.1000, appearing for plaintiff and opposing party.

The matter was argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling with modifications: DEFENDANTS SOUTH BEACH CAFE, INC., MICHELE D'AMICO AND FERDINANDO BALLARE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Sustained in part and overruled in part. Order signed in open Court. (See order for details of the ruling.) Judge: Harold Kahn; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-27-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Simon Mazzola, Esq., of The Mazzola Law Office, Tel. 650.403.4802, appearing for defendant and moving party.
Arlo Garcia Uriarte, Esq., of Liberation Law Group, Tel. 415.695.1000, appearing for plaintiff and opposing party.

The matter was argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling with modifications: DEFENDANTS SOUTH BEACH CAFE, INC., MICHELE D'AMICO AND FERDINANDO BALLARE'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF THE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Granted in part and Denied in part. Order signed in open Court. (See order for details of the ruling.) Judge: Harold Kahn; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976
